title: Voltaic Cable — FITAG Tech Expo 2024
design_brief__THE_CHALLENGE: Create a 24 SQM 3 side open stall for Voltaic Cable that showcases the cable product range clearly with strong brand visibility at FITAG Tech Expo - IT Show.
description__WHAT_WE_DESIGNED: Approach Media designed and fabricated a 24 SQM 3 side open stall exhibition stall for Voltaic Cable at FITAG Tech Expo - IT Show, Helipad Ground, Gandhinagar. The booth presents a cable and connectivity product display with structured shelving, product samples, and a clean industrial brand identity.
ai_summary__WHY_IT_WORKED: Voltaic Cable exhibition stall by Approach Media at FITAG Tech Expo - IT Show, Gandhinagar: 24 SQM 3 side open stall with cable product display shelving and industrial brand identity.
special_features: Product Display Shelving | Cable Rack System

title: Sun Pharma — CPHI India 2024
design_brief__THE_CHALLENGE: Design a 72 SQM double decker stall for Sun Pharma at CPHI India 2024 with a VIP mezzanine, LED display wall, and structured product zones for their API and formulation portfolio.
description__WHAT_WE_DESIGNED: Approach Media designed and fabricated a 72 SQM double-decker exhibition stall for Sun Pharma at CPHI India 2024, Bombay Exhibition Centre, Mumbai. Ground floor (48 sqm) comprises a product display zone, LED video wall, and open meeting area. Mezzanine (24 sqm) houses a VIP meeting room with glass enclosure and branded reception. Structural frame: aluminium extrusion with RCC mezzanine slab. Materials: fabric graphics, powder-coated steel, tempered glass, vinyl flooring. Design style: premium corporate.
ai_summary__WHY_IT_WORKED: The 72 SQM double-decker stall gave Sun Pharma a dominant presence at CPHI 2024. The LED wall drew footfall from across the hall while the mezzanine VIP room enabled private business conversations — balancing brand impact with practical deal-making infrastructure.
materials_used: Aluminium Extrusion | RCC Mezzanine Slab | Tempered Glass | Fabric Graphics | Vinyl Flooring
special_features: LED Video Wall | VIP Mezzanine Room | Glass Enclosure
meta_title: Sun Pharma Double Decker Stall — CPHI India 2024 Mumbai | Approach Media
meta_description: 72 sqm double-decker exhibition booth with LED wall and VIP mezzanine. Built for Sun Pharma at CPHI India 2024 Bombay Exhibition Centre Mumbai.
